Pixel Dungeon: No games have been played yet.

點陣地城: 目前的遊戲進度將被刪除。

Pixel Dungeon: To unlock this character class, slay the 3rd boss with any other class
點陣地城: 要解鎖這個職業角色，請用任何其他職業打敗第 3 位 boss

Pixel Dungeon: To unlock "Challenges", win the game with any character class.
點陣地城: 要解鎖「挑戰」，請用任何職業角色破關。

Pixel Dungeon: File not found. For some reason...
點陣地城: 因為某些原因，找不到檔案...

Pixel Dungeon: Many heroes of all kinds ventured into the Dungeon before you. Some of them have returned with treasures and magical artifacts, most have never been heard of since. But none have succeeded in retrieving the Amulet of Yendor, which is told to be hidden in the depths of the Dungeon.\n\nYou consider yourself ready for the challenge, but most importantly, you feel that fortune smiles on you. It's time to start your own adventure!
點陣地城: 在你之前有許多英雄來過此地城探險。有些人帶著寶物和魔法物品歸去，而大部分的人都從此音訊全無。不過從來沒有人能成功取回炎多護符，據說它就藏在此地城的深處。\n\n你認為自己準備好接受挑戰了，但最重要的是，你覺得好運會眷顧你。是時候開始屬於你的冒險了！

Pixel Dungeon: You finally hold it in your hands, the Amulet of Yendor. Using its power you can take over the world or bring peace and prosperity to people or whatever. Anyway, your life will change forever and this game will end here. Or you can stay a mere mortal a little longer.
點陣地城: 終於握在你手裡了，炎多護符。運用它的力量你可以統治世界，或是為人們帶來和平與繁榮等等。總之你的生活將永遠改變，而遊戲也將在此結束。或者，你也可以再當個平凡人一段時間。

Pixel Dungeon: Welcome to the level %d of Pixel Dungeon!
點陣地城: 歡迎來到點陣地城第 %d 層！

Pixel Dungeon: Welcome back to the level %d of Pixel Dungeon!
點陣地城: 歡迎回到點陣地城第 %d 層！

Pixel Dungeon: Be cautious, since the dungeon is even more dangerous at night!
點陣地城: 小心點，因為地城到了晚上更加危險！

Pixel Dungeon: Your steps echo across the dungeon.
點陣地城: 你的腳步聲迴盪在整座地城中。

Pixel Dungeon: You hear the water splashing around you.
點陣地城: 你聽到四周有水花四濺的聲音。

Pixel Dungeon: The smell of vegetation is thick in the air.
點陣地城: 空氣中有濃厚的草木氣味。

Pixel Dungeon: The atmosphere hints that this floor hides many secrets.
點陣地城: 詭譎的氣氛暗示了這個樓層隱藏著許多秘密。

Pixel Dungeon: The pain snapped %s out of paralysis
點陣地城: 痛楚讓%s從麻痺中恢復了過來

Pixel Dungeon: One does not simply leave Pixel Dungeon.
點陣地城: 沒有人能這麼輕易離開點陣地城的。

Pixel Dungeon: Welcome to level %d! Now you are healthier and more focused. It's easier for you to hit enemies and dodge their attacks.
點陣地城: 歡迎來到等級 %d！現在你的生命力更高，也更加集中。擊中敵人和閃躲攻擊更容易了。

Pixel Dungeon: This chest is locked and you don't have matching key
點陣地城: 這個箱子鎖住了，而你沒有對應的鑰匙

Pixel Dungeon: You don't have a matching key
Caustic ooze eats your flesh. Wash away it!
點陣地城: 腐蝕黏液正侵蝕你的肉體。把它沖洗掉！

Pixel Dungeon: Warriors start with 11 points of Strength.
點陣地城: 戰士起始時有 11 點力量。

Pixel Dungeon: Warriors start with a unique short sword. This sword can be later "reforged" to upgrade another melee weapon.
點陣地城: 戰士起始時有一把獨特的短劍，這把劍之後可以藉由「再鑄」來升級其他近戰武器。

Pixel Dungeon: Warriors are less proficient with missile weapons.
點陣地城: 戰士對遠程武器較不精通。

Pixel Dungeon: Any piece of food restores some health when eaten.
點陣地城: 食用任何食物時都會恢復一些生命值。

Pixel Dungeon: Potions of Strength are identified from the beginning.
點陣地城: 一開始就能辨識力量藥劑。

Pixel Dungeon: Mages start with a unique Wand of Magic Missile. This wand can be later "disenchanted" to upgrade another wand.
點陣地城: 法師起始時有一把獨特的魔法箭法杖，這把法杖之後可以藉由「分解」來升級其他法杖。
法師充能法杖的速度較快。

Pixel Dungeon: When eaten, any piece of food restores 1 charge for all wands in the inventory.
點陣地城: 每吃一次食物，物品欄中的所有法杖都會補充一單位的能量。

Pixel Dungeon: Mages can use wands as a melee weapon.
點陣地城: 法師可以把法杖當作近戰武器使用。

Pixel Dungeon: Scrolls of Identify are identified from the beginning.
點陣地城: 一開始就能辨認辨識卷軸。

Pixel Dungeon: Rogues start with a Ring of Shadows+1.
點陣地城: 盜賊起始時擁有 +1 暗影之戒一只。

Pixel Dungeon: Rogues identify a type of a ring on equipping it.
點陣地城: 盜賊在戴上戒指後就能辨識它的種類。

Pixel Dungeon: Rogues are proficient with light armor, dodging better while wearing one.
點陣地城: 盜賊精通於輕防具，穿著時會更容易閃避攻擊。

Pixel Dungeon: Rogues are proficient in detecting hidden doors and traps.
點陣地城: 盜賊容易發現隱藏的門或陷阱。

Pixel Dungeon: Rogues can go without food longer.
點陣地城: 盜賊可以撐比較久才需要食物。

Pixel Dungeon: Scrolls of Magic Mapping are identified from the beginning.
點陣地城: 一開始就能辨識魔法定位卷軸。

Pixel Dungeon: Huntresses start with 15 points of Health.
點陣地城: 女獵手起始時有 15 點生命值。

Pixel Dungeon: Huntresses start with a unique upgradeable boomerang.
點陣地城: 女獵手起始時有一把獨特而可升級的迴力鏢。

Pixel Dungeon: Huntresses are proficient with missile weapons and get a damage bonus for excessive strength when using them.
點陣地城: 女獵手擅長使用遠程武器，使用時可依超出的力量獲得傷害加成。

Pixel Dungeon: Huntresses gain more health from dewdrops.
點陣地城: 女獵手透過露水回復的生命值較多。

Pixel Dungeon: Huntresses sense neighboring monsters even if they are hidden behind obstacles.
點陣地城: 女獵手可以感知到附近的怪物，即使它們躲在障礙物後面。

Pixel Dungeon: A successful attack with a melee weapon allows the _Gladiator_ to start a combo, in which every next successful hit inflicts more damage.
點陣地城: 當_鬥士_用近戰武器攻擊成功時可以進行連擊，每一次連續擊中的攻擊都會造成更大的傷害。

Pixel Dungeon: When severely wounded, the _Berserker_ enters a state of wild fury significantly increasing his damage output.
點陣地城: 當_狂戰士_受傷嚴重時會進入狂怒的狀態，大幅提高攻擊輸出。

Pixel Dungeon: After killing an enemy the _Warlock_ consumes its soul. It heals his wounds and satisfies his hunger.
點陣地城: 在擊殺敵人後_術士_會吸取對方的靈魂，治療傷口並稍微滿足食慾。

Pixel Dungeon: When fighting with a wand in his hands, the _Battlemage_ inflicts additional damage depending on the current number of charges. Every successful hit restores 1 charge to this wand.
點陣地城: 當_戰鬥法師_使用裝備在手中的法杖攻擊時，將根據目前儲存的能量值給予傷害加成。每次成功擊中會使該法杖補充 1 能量值。

Pixel Dungeon: When performing a surprise attack, the _Assassin_ inflicts additional damage to his target.
點陣地城: 當突襲成功，_刺客_對目標的傷害會有額外加成。

Pixel Dungeon: The _Freerunner_ can move almost twice faster, than most of the monsters. When he is running, the Freerunner is much harder to hit. For that he must be unencumbered and not starving.
點陣地城: _風行者_可用比大多數怪物快將近兩倍的速度移動。當跑動時，風行者較不容易被擊中，但前提是未超重及非處於快餓死的狀態。

Pixel Dungeon: _Snipers_ are able to detect weak points in an enemy's armor, effectively ignoring it when using a missile weapon.
點陣地城: _狙擊手_可以偵測到弱點，當使用遠程武器時能夠有效地無視敵人護甲。

Pixel Dungeon: Having a strong connection with forces of nature gives _Wardens_ an ability to gather dewdrops and seeds from plants. Also trampling a high grass grants them a temporary armor buff.
點陣地城: 與自然之力的強力連結給了_守護者_從植物獲取露水和種子的能力，且穿過草叢時能夠得到暫時的護甲 buff。

Pixel Dungeon: All potions, scrolls, rings & wands identified
點陣地城: 識別了所有藥劑、卷軸、戒指和法杖

Pixel Dungeon: Death from fire, poison, toxic gas & hunger
點陣地城: 死於火焰、中毒、毒氣和飢餓

Pixel Dungeon: 1st boss slain by Warrior, Mage, Rogue & Huntress
點陣地城: 以戰士、法師、盜賊和女獵手擊敗第 1 個 boss

Pixel Dungeon: 3rd boss slain by Gladiator, Berserker, Warlock, Battlemage, Freerunner, Assassin, Sniper & Warden
點陣地城: 以鬥士、狂戰士、術士、戰鬥法師、風行者、刺客、狙擊手及守護者擊敗第 3 個 boss

Pixel Dungeon: Amulet of Yendor obtained by Warrior, Mage, Rogue & Huntress
點陣地城: 以戰士、法師、盜賊和女獵手獲得炎多護符

點陣地城: 通過樓層而沒有擊殺任何怪物

在晚上擊殺 5 隻怪物

Pixel Dungeon: OK, a deal is a deal, dat's what I can do for you: I can reforge 2 items and turn them into one of a better quality.
點陣地城: OK，我們說好的。這是我能幫你做的：我可以把 2 個物品再鑄成一個品質更好的物品。

Pixel Dungeon: Do you want to respec into %s?

Oh yes! You are my hero!\nRegarding your reward, I don't have cash with me right now, but I have something better for you. This is my family heirloom ring: my granddad took it off a dead paladin's finger.
點陣地城: 哦讚啊！你真是我的英雄！\n說到你的獎賞，我目前沒有現金，但我有更好的東西可以給你。這是我的傳家戒指，我爺爺從一個死掉的聖騎士手指上拔下來的。

Pixel Dungeon: You won't know what's inside until you open it!
點陣地城: 在打開之前不會知道裡面有什麼！

Pixel Dungeon: But to open it you need a golden key.
點陣地城: 但你需要金鑰匙來開啟它。

Pixel Dungeon: You can see %s inside, but to open the chest you need a golden key.
點陣地城: 可以看到有%s在裡面，但你需要金鑰匙來開啟它。

Pixel Dungeon: This ancient tomb may contain something useful, but its owner will most certainly object to checking.
點陣地城: 這座古老的墳墓裡面可能會有用得上的東西，但它的主人一定會反對你進行搜查。

Pixel Dungeon: This is all that's left from one of your predecessors. Maybe it's worth checking for any valuables.
點陣地城: 某個前人如今只剩下一堆白骨。也許可以檢查看看有什麼好東西。

Pixel Dungeon: You died, but you were given another chance to win this dungeon. Will you take it?
點陣地城: 你死了，但可以再得到一次機會來戰勝這座地城。你要接受嗎？

Pixel Dungeon: The Dungeon lies right beneath the City, its upper levels actually constitute the City's sewer system. Being nominally a part of the City, these levels are not that dangerous. No one will call it a safe place, but at least you won't need to deal with evil magic here.
點陣地城: 這座地城就在城鎮正下方，其實頭幾層還構成了城鎮的地下水道系統。名義上這些樓層算是城鎮的一部份，沒那麼危險。雖然稱不上是安全的地方，但至少在這裡你還不需要應付邪惡的魔法。

Pixel Dungeon: Many years ago an underground prison was built here for the most dangerous criminals. At the time it seemed like a very clever idea, because this place indeed was very hard to escape. But soon dark miasma started to permeate from below, driving prisoners and guards insane. In the end the prison was abandoned, though some convicts were left locked up here.
點陣地城: 許多年前這裡曾經蓋了一座監獄來囚禁最危險的犯人。當時看來是個非常聰明的主意，因為這地方確實很難逃脫。但不久後黑暗的戾氣就從深處開始瀰漫開來，把犯人和守衛都逼瘋了。最後這個監獄遭到廢棄，雖然有些囚犯仍被關在此處。

Pixel Dungeon: The caves, which stretch down under the abandoned prison, are sparsely populated. They lie too deep to be exploited by the City and they are too poor in minerals to interest the dwarves. In the past there was a trade outpost somewhere here on the route between these two states, but it has perished since the decline of Dwarven Metropolis. Only omnipresent gnolls and subterranean animals dwell here now.
點陣地城: 這些從廢棄監獄延伸而下的洞窟人煙罕至。因為位置太深而無法被城鎮利用，貧乏的礦產又不足以引起矮人的興趣。過去這裡曾有個貿易據點位在兩大城邦的往來路線上，但已隨著矮人大都城的沒落而消亡。如今這裡只剩無所不在的豺狼人和地底動物棲息著。

Pixel Dungeon: Dwarven Metropolis was once the greatest of dwarven city-states. In its heyday the mechanized army of dwarves has successfully repelled the invasion of the old god and his demon army. But it is said, that the returning warriors have brought seeds of corruption with them, and that victory was the beginning of the end for the underground kingdom.
點陣地城: 矮人大都城曾是最大的矮人城邦。在全盛時期時它曾以機械軍隊成功擊退入侵的上古之神和其惡魔大軍。但人們說腐敗的種子隨著凱旋的戰士們歸來，而這場勝利就此拉開了地下王國滅亡的序幕。

Pixel Dungeon: In the past these levels were the outskirts of Metropolis. After the costly victory in the war with the old god dwarves were too weakened to clear them of remaining demons. Gradually demons have tightened their grip on this place and now it's called Demon Halls.\n\nVery few adventurers have ever descended this far...
點陣地城: 這幾階樓層本來是大都城的外圍地帶。在那場面對上古之神元氣大傷的勝利後，矮人們已經沒有餘力剷除殘存的惡魔。漸漸的惡魔們掌控了這個地方，現在這裡叫做惡魔大廳。\n\n很少有冒險者能到達這麼深的地方...

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, I see you have succeeded! I do hope it hasn't troubled you too much. As I promised, you can choose one of my high quality wands.
點陣地城: 哦，我看到你成功了！希望沒給你添太多麻煩。就如我所承諾的，你可以從我這些優質法杖中選擇一把。

Pixel Dungeon: Select an item for the quickslot
點陣地城: 選擇要放在快捷欄的物品

Pixel Dungeon: Your pack is too full for the %s
Because of frequent use, your %s has broken.
點陣地城: 由於經常使用，你的%s損壞了。

Pixel Dungeon: Because of frequent use, your %s is going to break soon.
點陣地城: 由於經常使用，你的%s很快就要損壞了。

Pixel Dungeon: The Amulet of Yendor is the most powerful known artifact of unknown origin. It is said that the amulet is able to fulfill any wish if its owner's will-power is strong enough to "persuade" it to do it.
點陣地城: 炎多護符是來歷不明而最為強大的著名聖物。據說這個聖物能夠實現所有願望，只要其擁有者的意志堅強到足以「說服」它。

Pixel Dungeon: The ancient symbol of immortality grants an ability to return to life after death. Upon resurrection all non-equipped items are lost.
點陣地城: 這個古老的永生徽記能施予死而復生的能力。復活後所有未裝備的物品都會遺失。

Pixel Dungeon: Using this kit of small tools and materials anybody can transform any armor into an "epic armor", which will keep all properties of the original armor, but will also provide its wearer a special ability depending on his class. No skills in tailoring, leatherworking or blacksmithing are required.
點陣地城: 使用這個包含小工具和材料的套組後，任何人都有辦法將任何防具改造成「史詩級防具」。這將保留原始防具的所有屬性，但會根據職業給予穿戴者一項特殊能力。不需具備裁縫、製皮或鍛造技能。

Pixel Dungeon: you applied the armor kit to upgrade your %s
點陣地城: 你使用防具套組並升級了你的%s

Pixel Dungeon: This is a relatively small bomb, filled with black powder. Conveniently, its fuse is lit automatically when the bomb is thrown.
點陣地城: 這是較小型的炸彈，填充著黑色火藥。為了方便起見，引信在炸彈被扔出後會自動點燃。

Pixel Dungeon: You killed yourself with a bomb...
點陣地城: 你用炸彈把自己殺死了...

Pixel Dungeon: You can store excess dew in this tiny vessel for drinking it later. If the vial is full, in a moment of deadly peril the dew will be consumed automatically.
點陣地城: 你可以將多餘的露水儲存在這個小容器供稍後飲用。如果這個小瓶裝滿了，在致命的危急時刻會自動使用露水。

Pixel Dungeon: The dew vial was emptied to heal your wounds.
點陣地城: 此露水瓶已為了治療你的傷勢而用盡。

Pixel Dungeon: You collected a dewdrop into your dew vial.
點陣地城: 你收集了一滴露水到露水瓶中。

Pixel Dungeon: There is not much honey in this small honeypot, but there is a golden bee there and it doesn't want to leave it.
點陣地城: 這小小的蜂蜜罐裡頭沒多少蜂蜜，但有一隻金色的蜜蜂在裡面不想離開。

Pixel Dungeon: Collect gold coins to spend them later in a shop.
點陣地城: 收集金幣並在商店使用它們。

Pixel Dungeon: you wince as your grip involuntarily tightens around your %s
點陣地城: 你猛然一顫，手不由自主地握緊%s。

Pixel Dungeon: Lloyd's beacon is an intricate magic device, that allows you to return to a place you have already been.
點陣地城: 洛伊德信標是個複雜的魔法裝置，能夠讓你傳送回一個到過的地方。

Pixel Dungeon: Strong magic aura of this place prevents you from using the lloyd's beacon!
點陣地城: 這地方有強大的魔法場域讓你無法使用洛伊德信標！

Pixel Dungeon: Psychic aura of neighboring creatures doesn't allow you to use the lloyd's beacon at this moment.
點陣地城: 附近怪物的精神場域使你目前無法使用洛伊德信標。

Pixel Dungeon: The lloyd's beacon is successfully set at your current location, now you can return here anytime.
點陣地城: 洛伊德信標已成功設置在你目前的位置，你可以隨時傳送回來。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nThis beacon was set somewhere on the level %d of Pixel Dungeon.
點陣地城: \n\n此信標已設置在點陣地城第 %d 層的某處。

Pixel Dungeon: This worn leather book is not that thick, but you feel somehow, that you can gather a lot from it. Remember though that reading this tome may require some time.
點陣地城: 這本封皮破舊的書不算厚，但不知為何你覺得可以從中學習到很多。不過記住，閱讀這本大書可能要花點時間。
你無法在失明的期間閱讀

Pixel Dungeon: You have chosen the way of the %s!
It's an indispensable item in The Demon Halls, which are notorious for their poor ambient lighting.
點陣地城: 這是在惡魔大廳必備的物品。那裡的環境是出了名的昏暗。

Pixel Dungeon: Using a weightstone, you can balance your melee weapon to increase its speed or accuracy.
點陣地城: 使用平衡石能夠讓你的近戰武器增進速度或命中率。

Pixel Dungeon: you balanced your %s to make it faster
點陣地城: 你調整了%s讓它速度更快了

Pixel Dungeon: you balanced your %s to make it more accurate
點陣地城: 你調整了%s讓它更精準了

Pixel Dungeon: How would you like to balance your %s?
Throw this seed to the place where you want to grow %1$s.\n\n%2$s
點陣地城: 將這顆種子扔在你希望長出%1$s的地方。\n\n%2$s

Pixel Dungeon: Upon touching a Dreamweed it secretes a glittering cloud of confusing gas.
點陣地城: 夢之草被碰觸到時會散發出閃亮而令人昏眩的氣體。

Pixel Dungeon: When a creature touches an Earthroot, its roots create a kind of natural armor around it.
點陣地城: 當有生物碰觸到地根草時，這些根會製造出自然的盔甲圍繞著它。

Pixel Dungeon: Touching a Fadeleaf will teleport any creature to a random place on the current level.
點陣地城: 當隱沒之葉被任何生物碰觸到時會將其傳送到該樓層的隨機一處。

Pixel Dungeon: When something touches a Firebloom, it bursts into flames.
點陣地城: 當火焰花被碰觸到時會爆發出熊熊火焰。

Pixel Dungeon: Upon touching an Icecap excretes a pollen, which freezes everything in its vicinity.
點陣地城: 當寒冰菇被碰觸到時會散發出花粉，將所有附近的東西冰凍住。

Pixel Dungeon: Berries of this shrub taste like sweet, sweet death.
點陣地城: 這種灌木果實的死亡滋味是如此、如此的甜美。

Pixel Dungeon: The seed emits a roar that echoes throughout the dungeon!
點陣地城: 這顆種子發出迴盪在整座地城中的轟鳴聲！

Pixel Dungeon: A Sorrowmoss is a flower (not a moss) with razor-sharp petals, coated with a deadly venom.
點陣地城: 哀傷之苔是一種花（而不是苔癬），有著銳利的花瓣，帶著致命毒液。

Pixel Dungeon: Sungrass is renowned for its sap's healing properties.
點陣地城: 日光草以其汁液的治療效果而聞名。

Pixel Dungeon: Interaction of different types of magic has erased the glyph on this armor!
點陣地城: 在不同類型魔法的交互作用下，這件防具上的符文被消除了！

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nThis %1$s provides damage absorption up to "%2$d"  points per attack.
點陣地城: \n\n這件%1$s在每次受到攻擊時最多吸收「%2$d」點傷害。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nBecause of your inadequate strength your movement speed and defense skill is decreased.
點陣地城: \n\n由於力量不足，你的移動速度和防禦能力下降了。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nBecause of your inadequate strength wearing this armor will decrease your movement speed and defense skill.
點陣地城: \n\n由於力量不足，穿戴這件防具將降低你的移動速度和防禦能力。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nTypical %1$s provides damage absorption up to %2$d points per attack and requires %3$d points of strength.
點陣地城: \n\n一般%1$s在每次受到攻擊時吸收最多 %2$d 點傷害，需要 %3$d 點力量來裝備。

Pixel Dungeon: Probably this armor is too heavy for you.
點陣地城: 這件防具對你來說可能太重了。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nYou can feel a malevolent magic lurking within the %s.
點陣地城: \n\n你能感受到這件%s上潛伏著惡意的魔法氣息。

Pixel Dungeon: You need to be wearing this armor to use its special power!
點陣地城: 你必須穿戴上這件防具來使用它的特殊能力！

Pixel Dungeon: This lightweight armor offers basic protection.
點陣地城: 這件輕便的防具提供了基本的保護。

Pixel Dungeon: A huntress in such cloak can create a fan of spectral blades. Each of these blades will target a single enemy in the huntress's field of view, inflicting damage depending on her currently equipped melee weapon.
點陣地城: 穿著這件斗篷的女獵手可以放出一圈幻影之刃，每支幻影之刃會分別鎖定女獵手視野內的一位敵人，給予的傷害依當下裝備的近戰武器計算。

Pixel Dungeon: Only huntresses can use this armor!
點陣地城: 只有女獵手能使用這件裝備！

Pixel Dungeon: Armor made from tanned monster hide. Not as light as cloth armor but provides better protection.
點陣地城: 由鞣製過的怪物皮革所製成。不像布甲那麼輕便，但提供了更好的防護。

Pixel Dungeon: Wearing this gorgeous robe, a mage can cast a spell of molten earth: all the enemies in his field of view will be set on fire and unable to move at the same time.
點陣地城: 穿上這件華麗長袍的法師可以施放熔岩術：視野中的所有敵人將陷入燃燒並無法動彈。

Pixel Dungeon: Only mages can use this armor!
點陣地城: 只有法師能使用這件裝備！

Pixel Dungeon: Interlocking metal links make for a tough but flexible suit of armor.
點陣地城: 將金屬環鏈結在一起所製成的護甲，堅硬又容易活動。

Pixel Dungeon: Enormous plates of metal are joined together into a suit that provides unmatched protection to any adventurer strong enough to bear its staggering weight.
點陣地城: 由大片金屬板相互接合製成的護甲，能夠提供無與倫比的保護，只要冒險者夠強壯而足以負荷那驚人的重量。

Pixel Dungeon: Wearing this dark garb, a rogue can perform a trick, that is called "smoke bomb" (though no real explosives are used): he blinds enemies who could see him and jumps aside.
點陣地城: 穿上這件深色外衣的盜賊可以使出叫做「煙霧炸彈」（雖然其實沒有真的用上炸藥）的招數：使看得到他的敵人暫時失明並躍到一旁。

Pixel Dungeon: Only rogues can use this armor!
點陣地城: 只有盜賊能使用這件裝備！

Pixel Dungeon: You can only jump to an empty location in your field of view
點陣地城: 只能跳躍到視野中空著的地點

Pixel Dungeon: Choose a location to jump to
The metal scales sewn onto a leather vest create a flexible, yet protective armor.
點陣地城: 將金屬鱗片縫在皮背心上，成為一件靈活又有保護效果的護甲。

Pixel Dungeon: While this armor looks heavy, it allows a warrior to perform heroic leap towards a targeted location, slamming down to stun all neighboring enemies.
點陣地城: 這套鎧甲看起來很沉重，卻可以讓戰士朝目標區域使出英勇躍擊，震地擊昏所有附近的敵人。

Pixel Dungeon: Only warriors can use this armor!
點陣地城: 只有戰士能使用這件裝備！

Pixel Dungeon: The enchantment of viscosity killed you...
This is a copper key ring, that lets you keep all your keys separately from the rest of your belongings.
點陣地城: 這是個銅製鑰匙圈，讓你可以將鑰匙和其他物品分開收納。

Pixel Dungeon: You can place any number of scrolls into this tubular container. It saves room in your backpack and protects scrolls from fire.
點陣地城: 你可以將任意數量的卷軸放入這個筒狀容器，節省背包空間並防止卷軸著火。

Pixel Dungeon: This small velvet pouch allows you to store any number of seeds in it. Very convenient.
點陣地城: 這個小絨布袋不論多少種子都能收納，非常方便。

Pixel Dungeon: This slim holder is made of leather of some exotic animal. It allows to compactly carry up to %d wands.
點陣地城: 這個修長的皮套是由某些奇特動物的皮所製成，可以緊密的收納最多 %d 支法杖。

Pixel Dungeon: Nothing fancy here: dried meat, some biscuits - things like that.
點陣地城: 沒什麼特別的，肉乾、餅乾，諸如此類。

Pixel Dungeon: It looks like a decent steak.
點陣地城: 一塊看起來還不賴的肉排。

Pixel Dungeon: It's a piece of frozen raw meat. The only way to eat it is by cutting thin slices of it. And this way it's surprisingly good.
點陣地城: 一塊冷凍生肉，食用的唯一方法是將它切片。這樣意外的還不錯吃。
你覺得皮膚變得堅硬了！

Pixel Dungeon: It looks exactly like a standard ration of food but smaller.
點陣地城: 看起來跟一般乾糧一樣，但比較小。

Pixel Dungeon: This is authentic Cornish pasty with traditional filling of beef and potato.
點陣地城: 有傳統牛肉與馬鈴薯餡料的道地肉餡餅。

Pixel Dungeon: The notches on this golden key are tiny and intricate. Maybe it can open some chest lock?
點陣地城: 這把金鑰匙上的刻槽小而精巧。也許可以用來開啟某些寶箱鎖？

Pixel Dungeon: The notches on this ancient iron key are well worn; its leather lanyard is battered by age. What door might it open?
點陣地城: 這把古老鐵鑰匙上的刻槽已經很陳舊了；它的皮繫繩歷經歲月風霜。可以用來開什麼門呢？
在第 %d 層找到的鑰匙

Pixel Dungeon: This key looks serious: its head is shaped like a skull. Probably it can open some serious door.
點陣地城: 這把鑰匙看起來很重要：頭部做成骷髏的造型。也許可以開啟某些重要的門。

Pixel Dungeon: This flask contains a swirling %s liquid. Who knows what it will do when drunk or thrown?
點陣地城: 這個瓶子裡裝著晃漾的%s液體。不知道喝下或投擲出去會有什麼效果？

Pixel Dungeon: Are you sure you want to drink it? In most cases you should throw such potions at your enemies.
點陣地城: 確定要喝下它嗎？在大多情況下你應該要把這種藥劑扔向敵人。

Pixel Dungeon: Are you sure you want to throw it? In most cases it makes sense to drink it.
點陣地城: 確定要扔出去嗎？在大多情況下把它喝下去比較合理。

Pixel Dungeon: The flask shatters and %s liquid splashes harmlessly
點陣地城: 瓶子碎了，%s液體無害的四處飛濺。

Pixel Dungeon: The storied experiences of multitudes of battles reduced to liquid form, this draught will instantly raise your experience level.
點陣地城: 無數戰鬥累積下來的經驗值濃縮成液體的形式，喝下一口就能立即提升你的經驗值等級。

Pixel Dungeon: Upon exposure to open air, this chemical will evaporate into a freezing cloud, causing any creature that contacts it to be frozen in place, unable to act and move.
點陣地城: 當暴露在空氣中，這種化學物質會蒸散成霜凍雲霧，讓接觸到的任何生物被凍結在原地，無法移動及採取行動

Pixel Dungeon: An elixir that will instantly return you to full health and cure poison.
點陣地城: 一種讓你立即回復所有生命並治癒狀態的靈藥。

Pixel Dungeon: Drinking this potion will render you temporarily invisible. While invisible, enemies will be unable to see you. Attacking an enemy, as well as using a wand or a scroll before enemy's eyes, will dispel the effect.
點陣地城: 喝下此藥劑會讓你暫時隱形，在隱形的期間敵人無法看到你。攻擊敵人以及在敵人面前使用法杖或卷軸會讓效果解除。

Pixel Dungeon: Drinking this curious liquid will cause you to hover in the air, able to drift effortlessly over traps. Flames and gases fill the air, however, and cannot be bypassed while airborne.
點陣地城: 喝下這種奇異的液體會讓你浮在空中，能夠毫不費力的飄移過陷阱。但火焰和氣體瀰漫在空氣中，因此無法從空中通過而不受影響。

Pixel Dungeon: This flask contains an unstable compound which will burst violently into flame upon exposure to open air.
點陣地城: 瓶子裡裝著不穩定的複合物，一旦暴露在空氣中便會猛烈爆發並燃燒。

Pixel Dungeon: This powerful liquid will course through your muscles, permanently increasing your strength by one point and health by five points.
點陣地城: 這強大的液體會進入你的肌肉，永久提升 1 點力量及 5 點生命。

Pixel Dungeon: After drinking this, your mind will become attuned to the psychic signature of distant creatures, enabling you to sense biological presences through walls. Also this potion will permit you to see through nearby walls and doors.
點陣地城: 喝下之後你的心靈會感應到遠方生物的精神意象，讓你能隔牆感知到生物的存在。這種藥劑也能讓你透視附近的牆壁和門。

Pixel Dungeon: You can somehow feel the presence of other creatures' minds!
點陣地城: 你能以某種方式感覺到其他生物心智的存在！

Pixel Dungeon: You can somehow tell that you are alone on this level at the moment.
點陣地城: 不知怎地你知道這層樓目前只有你一個人。

Pixel Dungeon: Upon exposure to open air, the liquid in this flask will vaporize into a numbing yellow haze. Anyone who inhales the cloud will be paralyzed instantly, unable to move for some time after the cloud dissipates. This item can be thrown at distant enemies to catch them within the effect of the gas.
點陣地城: 一旦暴露在空氣中，瓶中的液體會蒸散成讓人麻痺的黃色霧氣。吸入這種氣體將會立刻麻痺，在霧氣消散後的一段時間內動彈不得。這個道具可以扔向遠方的敵人，用氣體的效果逮住他們。

Pixel Dungeon: This reagent will quickly neutralize all harmful gases in the area of effect. Drinking it will give you a temporary immunity to such gases.
點陣地城: 這種試劑會迅速中和範圍中的所有有害氣體。喝下它則會讓你暫時免疫這些氣體。

Pixel Dungeon: You feel uncommon freshness in the air.
點陣地城: 你感覺到空氣中有種不尋常的清新。

Pixel Dungeon: This powerful liquid will course through your muscles, permanently increasing your strength by one point.
點陣地城: 這種強效的液體會進入你的肌肉，永久提升 1 點力量。

Pixel Dungeon: Newfound strength surges through your body.
點陣地城: 新獲得的力量湧入你的身體。

Pixel Dungeon: Uncorking or shattering this pressurized glass will cause its contents to explode into a deadly cloud of toxic green gas. You might choose to fling this potion at distant enemies instead of uncorking it by hand.
點陣地城: 拔開塞子或打破這種加壓的玻璃瓶會使內容物爆開成致命的綠色毒霧。你應該會想將此藥劑扔向遠方的敵人而不是在手上打開。

Pixel Dungeon: The ball of corpse dust doesn't differ outwardly from a regular dust ball. However, you know somehow that it's better to get rid of it as soon as possible.
點陣地城: 屍塵球在外觀上與一般的粉塵球沒什麼不同。但不知怎地你知道越快擺脫它越好。

Pixel Dungeon: This metal is called dark not because of its color (it doesn't differ from the normal gold), but because it melts under the daylight, making it useless on the surface.
點陣地城: 這種金屬名稱中的暗並不是因為顏色（它與一般的黃金沒什麼不同），而是因為它會在日光下融化，讓它在地表上毫無用處。

Pixel Dungeon: The rose has dried long ago, but it has kept all its petals somehow.
點陣地城: 這朵玫瑰很久以前就乾枯了，但不知為何還保有所有的花瓣。

Pixel Dungeon: Many dwarves and some of their larger creations carry these small pieces of metal of unknown purpose. Maybe they are jewelry or maybe some kind of ID. Dwarves are strange folk.
點陣地城: 許多矮人及某些他們的大型造物攜帶著這些用途不明的小金屬片。也許是首飾，也可能是某種身分徽記。畢竟矮人是很奇怪的種族。

Pixel Dungeon: You can barely see this tiny translucent fish in the air. In the water it becomes effectively invisible.
點陣地城: 在空氣中勉強才能看清這半透明的小魚，在水中就變成隱形的了。

Pixel Dungeon: You see your hands turn invisible!
This is a large and sturdy tool for breaking rocks. Probably it can be used as a weapon.
點陣地城: 這是用來敲碎岩石的堅固大型工具。也許可以當作武器。

Pixel Dungeon: There is no dark gold vein near you to mine
點陣地城: 附近沒有暗金礦脈可以開採。

Pixel Dungeon: It could be a nice hunting trophy, but it smells too bad to place it on a wall.
點陣地城: 這可以當作很不錯的狩獵戰利品，但掛在牆上聞起來實在太糟了。

Pixel Dungeon: This metal band is adorned with a large %s gem that glitters in the darkness. Who knows what effect it has when worn?
點陣地城: 這只金屬環上裝飾著一顆大大的%s，在黑暗中閃閃發光。誰知道戴上它會有什麼效果？

Pixel Dungeon: you are now familiar enough with your %1$s to identify it. It is %2$s.
點陣地城: 你現在對你的%1$s已經了解到足以辨識它了。它是%2$s。

Pixel Dungeon: You can only wear two rings at a time. Unequip one of your equipped rings.
點陣地城: 同時只能佩戴兩只戒指。先取下目前佩戴的其中一只。

Pixel Dungeon: Your %s tightens around your finger painfully
點陣地城: 你的%s帶著痛楚地束緊你的手指。

Pixel Dungeon: , and because it is cursed, you are powerless to remove it
點陣地城: ，由於被施加了詛咒，你無法脫下它。

Pixel Dungeon: %1$s\n\nYou can feel a malevolent magic lurking within the %2$s.
點陣地城: %1$s\n\n你能感受到這只%2$s中潛伏著惡意的魔法氣息。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring increases your chance to hit the enemy.
點陣地城: 這只戒指能增加你擊中敵人的機率。

Pixel Dungeon: Wearing this ring will allow the wearer to notice hidden secrets - traps and secret doors - without taking time to search. Degraded rings of detection will dull your senses, making it harder to notice secrets even when actively searching for them.
點陣地城: 這只戒指的人能讓配戴的人注意到隱藏的秘密──陷阱和暗門──而不用花時間搜索。劣化的探察之戒會讓你的感知退化，即使主動搜索也不容易發現秘密。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring provides resistance to different elements, such as fire, electricity, gases etc. Also it decreases duration of negative effects.
點陣地城: 這只戒指提供對各種元素的防護，像是火焰、雷電、氣體等等。也會減短負面狀態的持續時間。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring increases your chance to dodge enemy attack.
點陣地城: 這只戒指能增加你閃躲敵人攻擊的機率。

Pixel Dungeon: In fact this ring doesn't provide any magic effect, but it demonstrates to shopkeepers and vendors, that the owner of the ring is a member of The Thieves' Guild. Usually they are glad to give a discount in exchange for temporary immunity guarantee. Upgrading this ring won't give any additional bonuses.
點陣地城: 這只戒指事實上不會提供任何魔法效果，但它向商店老闆和攤販表明戒指的擁有者是盜賊公會的成員，通常對方都會樂意提供優惠來換得暫時平安無事的保證。升級這只戒指不會有任何額外效果。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring accelerates the wearer's flow of time, allowing one to perform all actions a little faster.
點陣地城: 這只戒指加快配戴者的時間流動，讓所有的行動都加快一些。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring increases your chance to gather dew and seeds from trampled grass.
點陣地城: 這只戒指能增加你踩過草叢時得到露水和種子的機率。

Pixel Dungeon: This ring increases the body's regenerative properties, allowing one to recover lost health at an accelerated rate. Degraded rings will decrease or even halt one's natural regeneration.
點陣地城: 這只戒指能增進身體的再生機能，加快損失生命值的回復速度。劣化的戒指則會減慢甚至停止自然回復。

Pixel Dungeon: Your wands will become more powerful in the energy field that radiates from this ring. Degraded rings of power will instead weaken your wands.
點陣地城: 你的法杖在這只戒指散發的能量場域中會變得更加強大。劣化的強力之戒則會削弱你的法杖能力。

Pixel Dungeon: Wearing this ring you can go without food longer. Degraded rings of satiety will cause the opposite effect.
點陣地城: 戴上這只戒指能夠在不吃食物的情況下撐更久。劣化的飽足之戒則會有相反的效果。

Pixel Dungeon: Enemies will be less likely to notice you if you wear this ring. Degraded rings of shadows will alert enemies who might otherwise not have noticed your presence.
點陣地城: 戴上這只戒指後敵人將較不容易發現你。劣化的暗影之戒則會驚動本來可能未注意到你的敵人。

Pixel Dungeon: Though this ring doesn't provide real thorns, an enemy that attacks you will itself be wounded by a fraction of the damage that it inflicts. Upgrading this ring won't give any additional bonuses.
點陣地城: 雖然這只戒指並不是真的有荊棘，敵人攻擊你時卻會受到自己所造成攻擊的一部份傷害。升級這只戒指不會有任何額外效果。

Pixel Dungeon: This parchment is covered with indecipherable writing, and bears a title of rune %s. Who knows what it will do when read aloud?
點陣地城: 這卷羊皮紙上記載著難解的文字，並施加了%s符文的標題。不知道若大聲唸誦後會有什麼效果？

Pixel Dungeon: You are now aware of the level layout.

Pixel Dungeon: The raw magical power bound up in this parchment will, when released, recharge all of the reader's wands to full power.

點陣地城: 能量湧入你的背包，為你的法杖充能。

Pixel Dungeon: a surge of energy courses through your pack, recharging your wands
點陣地城: 能量湧入你的背包，為你的所有法杖充能。

Pixel Dungeon: The incantation on this scroll will instantly strip from the reader's weapon, armor, rings and carried items any evil enchantments that might prevent the wearer from removing them.

Pixel Dungeon: Your pack glows with a cleansing light, and a malevolent energy disperses.

Pixel Dungeon: In a blink of an eye you were teleported to another location of the level.

Pixel Dungeon: The scroll emits a brilliant flash of red light
點陣地城: 卷軸發出鮮亮的紅色閃光。

Pixel Dungeon: The scroll emits a brilliant flash of red light and the %s flees!

Pixel Dungeon: This scroll will upgrade a single item, improving its quality. A wand will increase in power and in number of charges; a weapon will inflict more damage or find its mark more frequently; a suit of armor will deflect additional blows; the effect of a ring on its wearer will intensify. Weapons and armor will also require less strength to use, and any curses on the item will be lifted.
點陣地城: 此卷軸可升級一件物品，增進它的品質。法杖會強化力量和充能數量；武器會造成更多傷害或更容易擊中目標；防具會擋下更多攻擊；戒指對配戴者的影響會增強。武器和防具使用所需的力量會減少，且物品上的任何詛咒將被解除。

Pixel Dungeon: This scroll is able to imbue a weapon or an armor with a random enchantment, granting it a special power.
點陣地城: 此卷軸能為武器或防具附上一種隨機附魔，施予它特殊的能力。

Pixel Dungeon: You can't read a scroll while blinded
點陣地城: 你無法在失明的期間閱讀卷軸

Pixel Dungeon: This thin %s wand is warm to the touch. Who knows what it will do when used?

Pixel Dungeon: When this wand is used as a melee weapon, its average damage is %d points per hit.
點陣地城: 當這把法杖作為近戰武器使用時，平均每下造成 %d 點傷害。

Pixel Dungeon: You can use this wand as a melee weapon.
點陣地城: 你可以把這把法杖當作近戰武器使用。

Pixel Dungeon: your wand fizzles; it must be out of charges for now
點陣地城: 你的法杖嘶嘶作響；一定是能量用盡了。

Pixel Dungeon: The purple light from this wand will make the target run amok attacking random creatures in its vicinity.
點陣地城: 這把法杖發出的紫光會讓目標狂亂並隨機攻擊身邊的生物。

Pixel Dungeon: When a discharge of this wand hits a wall (or any other solid obstacle) it causes an avalanche of stones, damaging and stunning all creatures in the affected area.

Pixel Dungeon: You killed yourself with your own Wand of Avalanche...
點陣地城: 你用崩落法杖把自己殺死了...

Pixel Dungeon: This wand will allow you to teleport in the chosen direction. Creatures and inanimate obstructions will block the teleportation.

Pixel Dungeon: This wand unleashes bursts of magical fire. It will ignite flammable terrain, and will damage and burn a creature it hits.
點陣地城: 這把法杖可釋放出魔法烈焰，會點燃可燃的地形，且傷害並焚燒擊中的生物。

Pixel Dungeon: You killed yourself with your own Wand of Firebolt...
點陣地城: 你用火球法杖把自己殺死了...

Pixel Dungeon: A flick of this wand summons a flock of magic sheep, creating temporary impenetrable obstacle.
點陣地城: 輕揮這把法杖就能召喚魔法羊群，製造臨時路障。

Pixel Dungeon: This is a magic sheep. What's so magical about it? You can't kill it. It will stand there until it magically fades away, all the while chewing cud with a blank stare.
點陣地城: 這是一隻魔法羊。魔法點在哪呢？在於你殺不死牠。牠會一直站在原地直到消失，而在這段期間內就只是兩眼發直地不停反芻。

Pixel Dungeon: This wand conjures forth deadly arcs of electricity, which deal damage to several creatures standing close to each other.

Pixel Dungeon: You killed yourself with your own Wand of Lightning...
點陣地城: 你用雷電法杖把自己殺死了...

Pixel Dungeon: When life ceases new life always begins to grow... The eternal cycle always remains!
點陣地城: 「有生命終止總有新生命萌芽...永恆的循環生生不息！」

Pixel Dungeon: This wand will cause a creature to move and attack at half its ordinary speed until the effect ends
點陣地城: 這把法杖可使怪物的移動和攻擊速度減半，直到效果結束

點陣地城: 這把實用的法杖可以用來拿取遠處的東西，以及與敵人交換位置。從法杖發出的魔力波動可以觸發陷阱、踏平草木、打開關著的門及關上打開的門。

Pixel Dungeon: You have magically transported %s into your backpack
點陣地城: 你使用魔力將%s傳送到背包之中

點陣地城: 這件武器對你來說可能太重了。

Pixel Dungeon: It was balanced to make it faster.
點陣地城: 它已經被調整過而速度加快了。

Pixel Dungeon: It was balanced to make it more accurate.
點陣地城: 它已經被調整過而更加精準了。

Pixel Dungeon: You hold the %1$s at the ready%2$s.
, and because it is cursed, you are powerless to let go
點陣地城: ，由於被施加了詛咒，你無法放開它。

Pixel Dungeon: You can feel a malevolent magic lurking within %s.

Pixel Dungeon: you reforged the short sword to upgrade your %s
點陣地城: 你再鑄了短劍來為%s升級。

Pixel Dungeon: you can't upgrade a boomerang this way

Pixel Dungeon: The razor-sharp length of steel blade shines reassuringly.

點陣地城: 很少有怪物能承受這巨大鉛鋼塊的摧毀性重擊，但只有最強壯的冒險者能有效使用它。

Pixel Dungeon: \n\nAverage damage of this weapon equals to %d points per hit.

Pixel Dungeon: Because of your inadequate strength the accuracy and speed of your attack with this %s is decreased.
點陣地城: 由於你的力量不足，使用這把%s攻擊的命中率和速度會下降。

Pixel Dungeon: Because of your excess strength the damage of your attack with this %s is increased.
點陣地城: 由於你的力量比武器需求更高，使用這把%s攻擊的傷害會增加。

點陣地城: 向敵人擲出後，這把扁平的弧形木製投擲武器會飛回投擲者的手中。

Pixel Dungeon: These little evil darts don't do much damage but they can paralyze the target leaving it helpless and motionless for some time.

Pixel Dungeon: These simple metal spikes are weighted to fly true and sting their prey with a flick of the wrist.
點陣地城: 這些簡單的金屬銳物被加了重量以飛射得更為精準，並在拂手之間釘穿獵物。

點陣地城: 這些飛鏢上的尖刺設計成會釘在目標身上不放，同時綁在上頭的易爆物會爆燃成熊熊火焰。

Pixel Dungeon: This length of metal is weighted to keep the spike at its tip foremost as it sails through the air.
點陣地城: 金屬桿身加了重，確保飛行時尖端保持向前。

Pixel Dungeon: Star-shaped pieces of metal with razor-sharp blades do significant damage when they hit a target. They can be thrown at very high rate.

Pixel Dungeon: This throwing axe is not that heavy, but it still requires significant strength to be used effectively.

Pixel Dungeon: A cloud of confusion gas is swirling here.
點陣地城: 令人昏眩的氣體正瀰漫在此處。

Pixel Dungeon: Shafts of light pierce the gloom of the underground garden.
點陣地城: 一道道的光穿透了地下花園的陰暗。

Pixel Dungeon: A cloud of paralytic gas is swirling here.
點陣地城: 令人麻痺的氣體正瀰漫在此處。

Pixel Dungeon: Your sacrifice is worthy and so you are!
Sacrificial fire burns here. Every creature touched by this fire is marked as an offering for the spirits of the dungeon.
點陣地城: 獻祭之火在此燃燒。所有觸碰到此火焰的生物都會被標記為獻給地城之靈的祭品。

Pixel Dungeon: A greenish cloud of toxic gas is swirling here.
點陣地城: 微呈綠色的毒氣正瀰漫在此處。

Pixel Dungeon: You died from a toxic gas..
As you take a sip, you feel the knowledge pours into your mind. Now you know everything about your equipped items. Also you sense all items on the level and know all its secrets.
點陣地城: 啜飲一口後，你感到知識注入了腦海。現在你對自己裝備的物品瞭若指掌，也能感應到此樓層所有的物品，並知曉其中所有的秘密。

Pixel Dungeon: Power of knowledge radiates from the water of this well. Take a sip from it to reveal all secrets of equipped items.
點陣地城: 這口井中的水散發著智識的力量。啜飲一口來解開裝備物品的所有秘密。

Pixel Dungeon: Power of health radiates from the water of this well. Take a sip from it to heal your wounds and satisfy hunger.
點陣地城: 這口井中的水散發著健康的力量。啜飲一口來治癒傷口並恢復飽足。

Pixel Dungeon: As you take a sip, you feel your wounds heal completely.
點陣地城: 啜飲一口後，你感到傷口完全治癒了。

Pixel Dungeon: Power of change radiates from the water of this well. Throw an item into the well to turn it into something else.
點陣地城: 這口井中的水散發著轉化的力量。將一件物品扔入井中來讓它轉變成其他東西。

Pixel Dungeon: Everything is covered with a thick web here.
點陣地城: 這裡的所有東西都覆蓋著厚厚的蜘蛛網。

Pixel Dungeon: You hear something died in the distance
點陣地城: 你聽到有東西在遠處死去

Pixel Dungeon: These brisk and tenacious inhabitants of cave domes may defeat much larger opponents by replenishing their health with each successful attack.
點陣地城: 這些敏捷又頑強的穴頂生物透過每次成功攻擊來補充生命，可以擊敗比體型比牠們大得多的對手。

Pixel Dungeon: Brutes are the largest, strongest and toughest of all gnolls. When severely wounded, they go berserk, inflicting even more damage to their enemies.
點陣地城: 蠻人是豺狼人中最大、最壯又最強悍的。當嚴重受傷時，牠們會陷入暴怒而對敵人造成更大的傷害。

Pixel Dungeon: These huge crabs are at the top of the food chain in the sewers. They are extremely fast and their thick exoskeleton can withstand heavy blows.
點陣地城: 這些大型的螃蟹位於下水道食物鏈的頂端。牠們非常迅速，而厚實的外殼能夠抵擋沉重的打擊。

Pixel Dungeon: This creature resembles the sad ghost, but it swirls with darkness. Its face bears an expression of despair.
點陣地城: 這種怪物和哀傷鬼魂很類似，但有黑暗盤據著。它的臉上帶著絕望的表情。

Pixel Dungeon: This machine was created by the Dwarves several centuries ago. Later, Dwarves started to replace machines with golems, elementals and even demons. Eventually it led their civilization to the decline. The DM-300 and similar machines were typically used for construction and mining, and in some cases, for city defense.
點陣地城: 這台機器是矮人在幾世紀前製造的。後來矮人開始用巨石像、元素生物甚至惡魔來取代機器，最終導致其文明的滅亡。DM-300 和類似的機器們通常被用來建築和採礦，並在某些情況下用於城市防禦。

Pixel Dungeon: Wandering fire elementals are a byproduct of summoning greater entities. They are too chaotic in their nature to be controlled by even the most powerful demonologist.
點陣地城: 遊蕩的火元素是召喚強大實體時的副產物。它們天性太混亂，就算是最強的惡魔術者也無法控制。

Pixel Dungeon: One of this demon's other names is "orb of hatred", because when it sees an enemy, it uses its deathgaze recklessly, often ignoring its allies and wounding them.
點陣地城: 這種惡魔的另一個名字是「憎恨之球」，因為當看到敵人，它會不顧一切的使用死亡凝視，經常忽略同伴並傷害到它們。

Pixel Dungeon: This marsupial rat is much larger, than a regular one. It is surrounded by a foul cloud.
點陣地城: 這隻有袋鼠類比一般的大隻多了，並帶著一團臭氣。

Pixel Dungeon: Gnolls are hyena-like humanoids. They dwell in sewers and dungeons, venturing up to raid the surface from time to time. Gnoll scouts are regular members of their pack, they are not as strong as brutes and not as intelligent as shamans.
點陣地城: 豺狼人是像豺狼的人形生物。牠們住在下水道和地城之中，不時冒險到地表進行掠奪。豺狼人斥候是群體中的一般成員，不如蠻人強壯也不如薩滿聰明。

Pixel Dungeon: The Dwarves tried to combine their knowledge of mechanisms with their newfound power of elemental binding. They used spirits of earth as the "soul" for the mechanical bodies of golems, which were believed to be most controllable of all. Despite this, the tiniest mistake in the ritual could cause an outbreak.
點陣地城: 矮人嘗試將機械知識與新發現的元素力量結合。他們使用了大地精魂作為巨石像機械軀體的「靈魂」，據信這是最容易控制的精魂。儘管如此，儀式中只要出一點微小的差錯就會造成大爆炸。

Pixel Dungeon: Little known about The Goo. It's quite possible that it is not even a creature, but rather a conglomerate of substances from the sewers that gained rudiments of free will.
點陣地城: 人們對黏膠怪知道的不多。它很有可能根本不是一種生物，而是擁有基礎意志的下水道物質聚合體。

Pixel Dungeon: The last king of dwarves was known for his deep understanding of processes of life and death. He has persuaded members of his court to participate in a ritual, that should have granted them eternal youthfulness. In the end he was the only one, who got it - and an army of undead as a bonus.
點陣地城: 矮人最後的國王以其對操控生死的深刻瞭解而聞名。他說服了宮廷的成員參加一場原本應該讓他們青春永駐的儀式。但最後他是唯一得到這個結果的人──還附帶了一隊不死大軍。

Pixel Dungeon: You cannot kill me, %s... I am... immortal...
點陣地城: 你殺不死我的，%s... 我是... 不朽的...

Pixel Dungeon: These undead dwarves, risen by the will of the King of Dwarves, were members of his court. They appear as skeletons with a stunning amount of facial hair.
點陣地城: 這些依矮人國王意志而起身的不死矮人曾是他的宮廷成員。他們的外表像是長了驚人濃密鬍鬚的骷髏。

Pixel Dungeon: Mimics are magical creatures which can take any shape they wish. In dungeons they almost always choose a shape of a treasure chest, because they know how to beckon an adventurer.
點陣地城: 寶箱怪一種能夠隨意變形的魔法生物。在地城中幾乎總是選擇變成寶箱，因為它們深知如何引誘冒險者。

Pixel Dungeon: These monks are fanatics, who devoted themselves to protecting their city's secrets from all aliens. They don't use any armor or weapons, relying solely on the art of hand-to-hand combat.
點陣地城: 這些武僧都是狂熱分子，致力於保護城市的秘密不為外人所知。他們不使用任何防具或武器，全憑拳腳功夫。

Pixel Dungeon: %1$s has knocked the %2$s from your hands!
These carnivorous fish are not natural inhabitants of underground pools. They were bred specifically to protect flooded treasure vaults.
點陣地城: 這些肉食魚類並不是地下水池的原生棲息生物。牠們是被特地培育來保護水底的寶藏庫的。

Pixel Dungeon: Marsupial rats are aggressive, but rather weak denizens of the sewers. They can be dangerous only in big numbers.
點陣地城: 有袋鼠類是具有攻擊性但相對較弱的下水道生物。牠們只在數量多時比較危險。

Pixel Dungeon: These huge arachnid-like demonic creatures avoid close combat by all means, firing crippling serrated spikes from long distances.
點陣地城: 這些巨大的類節肢惡魔生物會用各種方法避免近戰，而在遠方發射讓人重傷的鋸齒尖刺。

Pixel Dungeon: The most intelligent gnolls can master shamanistic magic. Gnoll shamans prefer battle spells to compensate for lack of might, not hesitating to use them on those who question their status in a tribe.
點陣地城: 最聰明的豺狼人能夠掌握薩滿法術。豺狼人薩滿喜歡運用戰鬥法術來彌補力量的不足，也毫不遲疑地使用在質疑他們部族地位的人身上。

Pixel Dungeon: Skeletons are composed of corpses bones from unlucky adventurers and inhabitants of the dungeon, animated by emanations of evil magic from the depths below. After they have been damaged enough, they disintegrate in an explosion of bones.
點陣地城: 骷髏是由倒楣的冒險者和地城住民的屍骨組成的，而從下部樓層放射的邪惡魔法使其活動起來。當它們承受一定的傷害後，會瓦解成爆炸的骨頭。

Pixel Dungeon: You were killed by the explosion of bones...
點陣地城: 你被爆炸的骨頭殺死了...

Pixel Dungeon: These greenish furry cave spiders try to avoid direct combat, preferring to wait in the distance while their victim, entangled in the spinner's excreted cobweb, slowly dies from their poisonous bite.
點陣地城: 這些綠色的毛茸茸洞穴蜘蛛盡量避免直接作戰，而是在遠方等著犧牲者上門，困在蜘蛛網中後用帶毒的啃咬讓他們緩慢地死去。

Pixel Dungeon: You would think that it's just another ugly statue of this dungeon, but its red glowing eyes give itself away. While the statue itself is made of stone, the _%s_, it's wielding, looks real.
點陣地城: 你可能覺得這只是地城裡又一個醜陋的雕像，但它發著紅光的雙眼暴露了身分。雖然雕像本身是石頭做的，但它握著的_%s_看起來是真的。

Pixel Dungeon: The succubi are demons that look like seductive (in a slightly gothic way) girls. Using its magic, the succubus can charm a hero, who will become unable to attack anything until the charm wears off.
點陣地城: 魅魔是看起來像性感女性（微哥德風格）的惡魔。它能用魔法魅惑英雄，在效果結束前對方將無法進行任何攻擊。

Pixel Dungeon: The deadly swarm of flies buzzes angrily. Every non-magical attack will split it into two smaller but equally dangerous swarms.
點陣地城: 這群致命的蒼蠅憤怒地嗡鳴著。每次非魔法攻擊都會把牠們分成兩群較小但一樣危險的群體。

Pixel Dungeon: Tengu are members of the ancient assassins clan, which is also called Tengu. These assassins are noted for extensive use of shuriken and traps.
點陣地城: 天狗是古老刺客家族的成員，該家族就叫做天狗。這些刺客以大量使用手裡箭和陷阱而聞名。

Pixel Dungeon: Deeper levels of the dungeon have always been a hiding place for all kinds of criminals. Not all of them could keep a clear mind during their extended periods so far from daylight. Long ago, these crazy thieves and bandits have forgotten who they are and why they steal.
點陣地城: 地城較深的樓層一直都是各種罪犯的藏身之處，但不是所有人都能在這麼長時間不見天日的情況下保持腦袋清醒。這些瘋狂的盜賊和土匪早就忘了自己是誰以及為何而偷竊。

Pixel Dungeon: When dwarves' interests have shifted from engineering to arcane arts, warlocks have come to power in the city. They started with elemental magic, but soon switched to demonology and necromancy.
點陣地城: 當矮人的注意力從工程技術轉向祕法，術士便開始在城市中掌權。他們一開始使用元素魔法，但很快就轉移到惡魔法術和亡靈巫術。

Pixel Dungeon: A wraith is a vengeful spirit of a sinner, whose grave or tomb was disturbed. Being an ethereal entity, it is very hard to hit with a regular weapon.
點陣地城: 怨靈是一心想復仇的罪人靈魂，因為它的墳墓或墓碑被驚擾了。由於形體虛渺，很難用普通武器擊中。

Pixel Dungeon: Yog-Dzewa is an Old God, a powerful entity from the realms of chaos. A century ago, the ancient dwarves barely won the war against its army of demons, but were unable to kill the god itself. Instead, they then imprisoned it in the halls below their city, believing it to be too weak to rise ever again.
點陣地城: 猶格─殆瓦是一名古代神祇，來自混沌界域的強大實體。在一個世紀前，古代矮人勉強戰勝了祂的惡魔大軍，卻無法殺死古神本身。他們只能將祂囚禁在城市下方的大殿，相信祂已經太虛弱而無法再次作亂。

Pixel Dungeon: Despite their small size, golden bees tend to protect their master fiercely. They don't live long though.
點陣地城: 金蜜蜂雖然身軀嬌小，卻會兇悍地保衛牠們的主人。不過牠們沒辦法活太久。

Pixel Dungeon: This troll blacksmith looks like all trolls look: he is tall and lean, and his skin resembles stone in both color and texture. The troll blacksmith is tinkering with unproportionally small tools.
點陣地城: 這個巨魔鐵匠看起來就跟所有巨魔一樣：又高又瘦，皮膚的顏色和質地都像岩石一樣。巨魔鐵匠正在用不合比例的小工具笨拙地修理東西。

Pixel Dungeon: Hey human! Wanna be useful, eh? Take dis pickaxe and mine me some _dark gold ore_, _15 pieces_ should be enough. What do you mean, how am I gonna pay? You greedy...\nOk, ok, I don't have money to pay, but I can do some smithin' for you. Consider yourself lucky, I'm the only blacksmith around.
點陣地城: 嗨人類！想有點用處嗎，嗯？拿著這把十字鎬去幫我挖點_暗金礦_來吧，_15 個_應該就夠了。什麼意思，我要怎麼回報？你這貪婪的...\n好，好，我沒錢給你，但我可以幫你做點鐵工。你還真幸運，我是這裡唯一的鐵匠。

Pixel Dungeon: Hey human! Wanna be useful, eh? Take dis pickaxe and _kill a bat_ wit' it, I need its blood on the head. What do you mean, how am I gonna pay? You greedy...\nOk, ok, I don't have money to pay, but I can do some smithin' for you. Consider yourself lucky, I'm the only blacksmith around.
點陣地城: 嗨人類！想有點用處嗎，嗯？拿著這把十字鎬去幫我_殺隻蝙蝠_吧，我需要上面沾的牠的血。什麼意思，我要怎麼回報？你這貪婪的...\n好，好，我沒錢給你，但我可以幫你做點鐵工。你還真幸運，我是這裡唯一的鐵匠。

Pixel Dungeon: Are you kiddin' me? Where is my pickaxe?!
點陣地城: 你在耍我嗎？我的十字鎬呢？

Pixel Dungeon: Dark gold ore. 15 pieces. Seriously, is it dat hard?
點陣地城: 暗金礦。15 個。說真的，有這麼難嗎？

Pixel Dungeon: I said I need bat blood on the pickaxe. Chop chop!
點陣地城: 我說過我需要十字鎬上的蝙蝠血。快快！

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, you have returned... Better late dan never.
點陣地城: 哦，你回來了... 晚到總比沒到好。
你的%s看起來真的更棒了

Pixel Dungeon: Select 2 different items, not the same item twice!
點陣地城: 選取兩件不同的物品，而不是同樣的物品兩次！

Pixel Dungeon: Select 2 items of the same type!
點陣地城: 選取兩件相同類型的物品！

Pixel Dungeon: I need to know what I'm working with, identify them first!
點陣地城: 我得知道自己在處理什麼東西，先辨識它們！

Pixel Dungeon: I don't work with cursed items!
點陣地城: 我不處理被詛咒的物品！

Pixel Dungeon: It's a junk, the quality is too poor!
點陣地城: 這根本是垃圾，品質太爛了！

Pixel Dungeon: The ghost is barely visible. It looks like a shapeless spot of faint light with a sorrowful face.
點陣地城: 這個鬼魂幾乎看不見。就像是微弱的模糊光點加上一張哀傷的臉。

Pixel Dungeon: Hello adventurer... Once I was like you - strong and confident... And now I'm dead... But I can't leave this place... Not until I have my _dried rose_... It's very important to me... Some monster stole it from my body...
點陣地城: 你好冒險者...我曾經跟你一樣──強壯又自信...而現在我死了...卻無法離開這個地方...除非我拿回我的_乾燥玫瑰_...它對我很重要...某個怪物把它從我的屍體上偷走了...
拜託... 幫幫我... _找到那朵玫瑰_...

Pixel Dungeon: Yes! Yes!!! This is it! Please give it to me! And you can take one of these items, maybe they will be useful to you in your journey...
點陣地城: 對！對!!! 就是它！請把它給我！你可以拿走其中一個物品，也許對你的旅途會有幫助...

Pixel Dungeon: Hello adventurer... Once I was like you - strong and confident... And now I'm dead... But I can't leave this place... Not until I have my revenge... Slay the _fetid rat_, that has taken my life...
點陣地城: 你好冒險者...我曾經跟你一樣──強壯又自信...而現在我死了...卻無法離開這個地方...除非我報了仇...殺了那隻_惡臭鼠_，就是牠奪走了我的生命...
拜託... 幫幫我... _殺了那討厭的東西_...

Pixel Dungeon: Yes! The ugly creature is slain and I can finally rest... Please take one of these items, maybe they will be useful to you in your journey...
點陣地城: 太好了！那醜陋的怪物被擊敗了，我終於可以安息了... 請拿走其中一個物品，也許對你的旅途會有幫助...

Pixel Dungeon: Hello adventurer... Once I was like you - strong and confident... And now I'm dead... But I can't leave this place, as I am bound by a horrid curse... Please... Help me... _Destroy the curse_...
點陣地城: 你好冒險者...我曾經跟你一樣──強壯又自信...而現在我死了...卻無法離開這個地方，因為我被可怕的詛咒給束縛住了... 拜託... 幫幫我... _破除這個詛咒_...

Pixel Dungeon: Thank you, %s! The curse is broken and I can finally rest... Please take one of these items, maybe they will be useful to you in your journey...
點陣地城: 謝謝你，%s！詛咒破除了，我終於可以安息了... 請拿走其中一個物品，也許對你的旅途會有幫助...

Pixel Dungeon: Yes, I will do it for you
Imps are lesser demons. They are notable for neither their strength nor their magic talent, but they are quite smart and sociable. Many imps prefer to live among non-demons.
點陣地城: 小鬼是比較低階的惡魔。它們的力量和魔法天賦並不出色，但它們相當聰明且善於交涉。許多小鬼比較喜歡跟非惡魔族群生活在一起。

Pixel Dungeon: Are you an adventurer? I love adventurers! You can always rely on them if something needs to be killed. Am I right? For a bounty, of course ;)\nIn my case this is _golems_ who need to be killed. You see, I'm going to start a little business here, but these stupid golems are bad for business! It's very hard to negotiate with wandering lumps of granite, damn them! So please, kill... let's say _6 of them_ and a reward is yours.
點陣地城: 你是冒險者嗎？我最喜歡冒險者了！想殺什麼的時候靠他們就對了，我說的沒錯吧？有賞金，當然囉 ;)\n就我而言要殺的是_巨石像_。你知道，我正準備在這裡做些小生意，但這些愚蠢的巨石像對我的生意不利！要跟這些遊蕩的石塊談判實在有夠難，去死吧！所以拜託了，殺掉... 我看_6 隻_好了，獎賞就是你的了。

Pixel Dungeon: How is your golem safari going?
點陣地城: 你的巨石像獵殺進行得如何？

Pixel Dungeon: Are you an adventurer? I love adventurers! You can always rely on them if something needs to be killed. Am I right? For a bounty, of course ;)\nIn my case this is _monks_ who need to be killed. You see, I'm going to start a little business here, but these lunatics don't buy anything themselves and will scare away other customers. So please, kill... let's say _8 of them_ and a reward is yours.
點陣地城: 你是冒險者嗎？我最喜歡冒險者了！想殺什麼的時候靠他們就對了，我說的沒錯吧？有賞金，當然囉 ;)\n就我而言要殺的是_武僧_。你知道，我正準備在這裡做些小生意，但這些瘋子自己什麼都不買，還會嚇走其他客人。所以拜託了，殺掉... 我看_8 個_好了，獎賞就是你的了。

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, you are still alive! I knew that your kung-fu is stronger ;) Just don't forget to grab these monks' tokens.
點陣地城: 哦，你還活著！我就知道你的功夫比較厲害 ;) 別忘了拿走這些武僧的令牌。

Pixel Dungeon: Imps are lesser demons. They are notable for neither their strength nor their magic talent. But they are quite smart and sociable, and many of imps prefer to live and do business among non-demons.
點陣地城: 小鬼是比較低階的惡魔。它們的力量和魔法天賦並不出色，但它們相當聰明且善於交涉。許多小鬼比較喜歡跟非惡魔族群生活和做生意。

Pixel Dungeon: This illusion bears a close resemblance to you, but it's paler and twitches a little.
點陣地城: 這個鏡像的外觀跟你很像，但比較蒼白並微微地抽搐著。

Pixel Dungeon: This rat is a little bigger than a regular marsupial rat and it's wearing a tiny crown on its head.
點陣地城: 這隻老鼠比一般的有袋鼠類大了點，頭上還戴著小小的王冠。

Pixel Dungeon: What is it? I have no time for this nonsense. My kingdom won't rule itself!
點陣地城: 什麼事？我沒空理會這種沒意義的事。我的王國可不會統治自己啊！

Pixel Dungeon: This stout guy looks more appropriate for a trade district in some large city than for a dungeon. His prices explain why he prefers to do business here.
點陣地城: 這個矮胖的傢伙看起來比較適合在大城市商業區出現，而不是地城。但他的價格解釋了為何選擇在這裡做生意。

Pixel Dungeon: This old but hale gentleman wears a slightly confused expression. He is protected by a magic shield.
點陣地城: 這位年老但硬朗的紳士帶著有點困惑的表情。他正受到一個魔法盾的保護。

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, what a pleasant surprise to meet a decent person in such place! I came here for a rare ingredient - a _Rotberry seed_. Being a magic user, I'm quite able to defend myself against local monsters, but I'm getting lost in no time, it's very embarrassing. Probably you could help me? I would be happy to pay for your service with one of my best wands.
點陣地城: 哦，在這種地方遇上一位體面的人真讓人驚喜！我是來這裡尋找一種稀有材料的──_墮落之果的種子_。身為一位魔法師，我可以從怪物手中保護自己，但一下子就迷路了，真丟臉。也許你能幫助我？我很樂意用其中一把最好的法杖來回報你。

Pixel Dungeon: Any luck with a _Rotberry seed_, %s? No? Don't worry, I'm not in a hurry.
點陣地城: 有找到_墮落之果的種子_嗎，%s？沒關係，我不急。

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, what a pleasant surprise to meet a decent person in such place! I came here for a rare ingredient - _corpse dust_. It can be gathered from skeletal remains and there is an ample number of them in the dungeon. Being a magic user, I'm quite able to defend myself against local monsters, but I'm getting lost in no time, it's very embarrassing. Probably you could help me? I would be happy to pay for your service with one of my best wands.
點陣地城: 哦，在這種地方遇上一位體面的人真讓人驚喜！我是來這裡尋找一種稀有材料的──_屍塵_。它可以從骨骸上收集到，而這個地城中有大量這種東西。身為一位魔法師，我可以從怪物手中保護自己，但一下子就迷路了，真丟臉。也許你能幫助我？我很樂意用其中一把最好的法杖來回報你。

Pixel Dungeon: Any luck with _corpse dust_, %s? Bone piles are the most obvious places to look.
點陣地城: 有找到_屍塵_嗎，%s？骨骸堆是最明顯的搜尋處。

Pixel Dungeon: Oh, what a pleasant surprise to meet a decent person in such place! I came here for a rare ingredient - a _phantom fish_. You can catch it with your bare hands, but it's very hard to notice in the water. Being a magic user, I'm quite able to defend myself against local monsters, but I'm getting lost in no time, it's very embarrassing. Probably you could help me? I would be happy to pay for your service with one of my best wands.
點陣地城: 哦，在這種地方遇上一位體面的人真讓人驚喜！我是來這裡尋找一種稀有材料的──_幻影魚_。它們可以用徒手抓住，但在水中非常不容易注意到它們。身為一位魔法師，我可以從怪物手中保護自己，但一下子就迷路了，真丟臉。也許你能幫助我？我很樂意用其中一把最好的法杖來回報你。

Pixel Dungeon: Any luck with a _phantom fish_, %s? You may want to try searching for it in one of the local pools.
點陣地城: 有找到_幻影魚_嗎，%s？你也許可以在某個水池中找找看。
觸動到一塊隱藏的壓板了！

Pixel Dungeon: In case of burning step into the water to extinguish the fire.
點陣地城: 要是著火了，走進水裡可以滅火。

Pixel Dungeon: Stairs lead up to the upper depth.
Stairs lead down to the lower depth.

點陣地城: 茂密的植物擋住了視線。

Pixel Dungeon: This door is locked, you need a matching key to unlock it.
點陣地城: 這扇門鎖住了，你需要對應的鑰匙來打開它。

Pixel Dungeon: Heavy bars block the stairs leading down.
點陣地城: 沉重的鐵條封住了往下的階梯。

Pixel Dungeon: The wooden barricade is firmly set but has dried over the years. Might it burn?
點陣地城: 這木頭路障設置得很堅固，但已隨著歲月變得乾燥。也許可以燒？

Pixel Dungeon: You can't read the text from here.
點陣地城: 從這裡看不到上面的字。

Pixel Dungeon: Stepping onto a hidden pressure plate will activate the trap.
點陣地城: 踏上隱藏的壓板會啟動陷阱。

Pixel Dungeon: The trap has been triggered before and it's not dangerous anymore.
點陣地城: 這個陷阱已經觸發過，不具危險性了。

Pixel Dungeon: Someone wanted to adorn this place, but failed, obviously.
點陣地城: 有人想要裝飾這個地方，但顯然失敗了。

Pixel Dungeon: Drop some seeds here to cook a potion.
點陣地城: 扔進一些種子來調配藥劑。

Pixel Dungeon: The ladder leads up to the upper depth.
點陣地城: 這把梯子通往上方的樓層。

Pixel Dungeon: The ladder leads down to the lower depth.
點陣地城: 這把梯子通往下方的樓層。
巨大的蘑菇擋住了視線。

Pixel Dungeon: A vein of some ore is visible on the wall. Gold?
點陣地城: 牆上可以看到某種礦脈。是金礦嗎？

Pixel Dungeon: Who would need a bookshelf in a cave?
點陣地城: 誰會在洞穴裡需要書架呢？

Pixel Dungeon: A ramp leads down to the lower depth.
The statue depicts some dwarf standing in a heroic stance.
點陣地城: 這個雕像刻劃著英雄站姿的矮人。

Pixel Dungeon: The rows of books on different disciplines fill the bookshelf.
點陣地城: 一排排不同領域的書籍放滿了書架。

Pixel Dungeon: Books in ancient languages smolder in the bookshelf.
點陣地城: 用古代語言寫成的書籍鬱積在書架上。

Pixel Dungeon: It looks like lava, but it's cold and probably safe to touch.
點陣地城: 看起來像岩漿不過已經冷卻了，碰了應該沒事。

Pixel Dungeon: The pillar is made of real humanoid skulls. Awesome.
點陣地城: 這柱子是用真正的人形頭顱做成的。讚啦。

Pixel Dungeon: A ramp leads up to the upper depth.
A ramp leads down to the Inferno.
There are old blood stains on the floor.
This is probably a vestige of a prison library. Might it burn?
點陣地城: 這可能是監獄圖書館的殘跡。也許可以燒？

Pixel Dungeon: Wet yellowish moss covers the floor.
點陣地城: 潮濕的暗黃色苔癬覆蓋在地面上。

Pixel Dungeon: The bookshelf is packed with cheap useless books. Might it burn?
點陣地城: 這個書架塞滿了廉價的垃圾書。也許可以燒？

Pixel Dungeon: Yes, I know what I'm doing
點陣地城: 是的，我知道我在做什麼

Pixel Dungeon: Do you really want to jump into the chasm? You can probably die.
點陣地城: 真的要跳進這深淵嗎？你可能會死去。

Pixel Dungeon: As you try to read the sign it bursts into greenish flames.
點陣地城: 你試圖閱讀標牌時，它燒成了一團綠色的火焰。

Pixel Dungeon: Don't overestimate your strength, use weapons and armor you can handle.
點陣地城: 別高估自己的力量，使用你可以掌握的武器和防具。

Pixel Dungeon: Not all doors in the dungeon are visible at first sight. If you are stuck, search for hidden doors.
點陣地城: 不是所有地城中的門都是放眼可見的。如果你被困住了，找找看隱藏的門。

Pixel Dungeon: Remember, that raising your strength is not the only way to access better equipment. You can go the other way, lowering its strength requirement with Scrolls of Upgrade.
點陣地城: 記住，提升自己的力量不是能夠使用更好裝備的唯一方式。你也可以採取另一種方式，用升級卷軸降低力量需求。

Pixel Dungeon: You can spend your gold in shops on deeper levels of the dungeon. The first one is on the 6th level.
點陣地城: 你可以在地城深處樓層的商店花用金幣。第一間是在第六層。

Pixel Dungeon: Pixel-Mart. All you need for successful adventure!
點陣地城: 點陣商店──這裡有成功冒險必備的所有商品！

Pixel Dungeon: Identify your potions and scrolls as soon as possible. Don't put it off to the moment when you actually need them.
點陣地城: 盡快辨識你的藥劑和卷軸。別拖到你真正需要用到的時候。

Pixel Dungeon: Being hungry doesn't hurt, but starving does hurt.
點陣地城: 肚子餓沒關係，但快餓死就有事了。

Pixel Dungeon: Surprise attack has a better chance to hit. For example, you can ambush your enemy behind a closed door when you know it is approaching.
點陣地城: 突襲擊中的機率較高。例如你可以在一扇關閉的門後面伏擊敵人，若你知道它正在接近。
點陣商店。錢離手，活更久。

Pixel Dungeon: When you're attacked by several monsters at the same time, try to retreat behind a door.
點陣地城: 當你同時被許多怪物攻擊時，試著退到門後。

Pixel Dungeon: If you are burning, you can't put out the fire in the water while levitating.
點陣地城: 如果你著火了，無法在浮空時站進水中滅火。

Pixel Dungeon: There is no sense in possessing more than one Ankh at the same time, because you will lose them upon resurrecting.
點陣地城: 同時持有超過一個生命之符是沒有意義的，因為復活時會失去它們。

Pixel Dungeon: DANGER! Heavy machinery can cause injury, loss of limbs or death!
點陣地城: 危險！重型機械可能會造成受傷、肢體損害或死亡！

Pixel Dungeon: Pixel-Mart. A safer life in dungeon.
點陣地城: 點陣商店。讓你擁有更安全的地城生活。

Pixel Dungeon: When you upgrade an enchanted weapon, there is a chance to destroy that enchantment.
點陣地城: 升級一件有附魔的武器時，有一定機率會摧毀該附魔。

Pixel Dungeon: Weapons and armors deteriorate faster than wands and rings, but there are more ways to fix them.
點陣地城: 武器和防具損壞得比法杖和戒指快，但也有比較多方法能夠修復。

Pixel Dungeon: The only way to obtain a Scroll of Wipe Out is to receive it as a gift from the dungeon spirits.
點陣地城: 取得殲滅卷軸的唯一方式是由地城之靈將它作為禮物送給你。

Pixel Dungeon: No weapons allowed in the presence of His Majesty!
點陣地城: 在陛下面前不得攜帶武器！

Pixel Dungeon: Pixel-Mart. Special prices for demon hunters!
點陣地城: 點陣商店。惡魔獵人可享有特別折扣！

Pixel Dungeon: The trap emits a piercing sound that echoes throughout the dungeon!
點陣地城: 陷阱發出了迴盪在整座地城中的刺耳聲響！

Pixel Dungeon: You were killed by a discharge of a lightning trap...
You don't know what is there.
LibGDX port: Arcnor / Web port: nojus297
點陣地城: LibGDX 移植：Arcnor / 網頁移植：nojus297

Pixel Dungeon: This is a voluntary tip for the Telegram port. It never affects gameplay.
點陣地城: 這是對 Telegram 移植版的自願贊助，絕不會影響遊戲體驗。
使用 Telegram Stars 支持

Pixel Dungeon: Press a key for "%s", or press %s to remove the binding.
點陣地城: 請為「%s」按下一個按鍵，或按下%s移除綁定。

Pixel Dungeon: As you take a sip, you feel something changing inside you.
點陣地城: 喝下一口後，你感覺體內有什麼正在改變。

Pixel Dungeon: You merged two wands into one %s.
點陣地城: 你將兩根法杖融合成了%s。
選擇一根要融合的法杖
